title: The Miranda Hypothesis: How Hamilton Poisoned Persona Evals - Jacob E. Thomas, Results Gen
summary: Jacob E. Thomas argues that persona-eval pipelines measuring character fidelity in LLMs systematically miss "Miranda distortion", the failure mode where cultural overrepresentation in training data (e.g., Hamilton the musical) drowns out primary documentary record (Federalist Papers), producing convincing but anachronistic outputs. He proposes epistemic simulation with domain-expert evaluation using the pre-registered Prism Experiment as a corrective instrument.
